channel.title: Claude Code Live Cheatsheet
channel.description: Auto-updating cheatsheet for Claude Code — keyboard shortcuts, commands, tips, and more.

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.142 highlights
item.description:
• claude agents: --add-dir, --settings, --mcp-config, --model, --effort flags (v2.1.142)
  • Fast mode default upgraded to Opus 4.7; override env to pin 4.6 (v2.1.142)
  • Plugin root SKILL.md (no skills/ dir) now surfaces as a skill (v2.1.142)
  • Plugin details pane and /plugin now show LSP servers (v2.1.142)
  • /web-setup warns before replacing GitHub App connection (v2.1.142)

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.142
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_OPUS_4_6_FAST_MODE_OVERRIDE: Pin fast mode to Opus 4.6 (default now Opus 4.7)
+ [skills-agents] root SKILL.md: Plugin skill without skills/ subdirectory
~ [cli-flags] claude agents: Agent dashboard; --cwd scope; --add-dir, --model, --effort, --permission-mode
~ [cli-flags] claude plugin details <name>: Show plugin components, LSP servers, and projected token cost
- [config-env] sandbox.network.deniedDomains

Full changelog

• Added new `claude agents` flags: `--add-dir`, `--settings`, `--mcp-config`, `--plugin-dir`, `--permission-mode`, `--model`, `--effort`, and `--dangerously-skip-permissions` to configure dispatched background sessions
• Fast mode now uses Opus 4.7 by default (previously Opus 4.6). Set `CLAUDE_CODE_OPUS_4_6_FAST_MODE_OVERRIDE=1` to pin fast mode to Opus 4.6
• Plugins with a root-level `SKILL.md` and no `skills/` subdirectory are now surfaced as a skill
• The `/plugin` details pane and `claude plugin details` now show LSP servers a plugin provides
• `/web-setup` warns before replacing an existing GitHub App connection
• Fixed `MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT` not raising the per-request fetch timeout for remote HTTP and SSE MCP servers, which capped tool calls at 60 seconds regardless of the configured value
• Fixed background sessions not recognizing pre-existing git worktrees, blocking Edit while EnterWorktree refused to create a duplicate
• Fixed background sessions disappearing and daemon reconnect failing after macOS sleep/wake — the daemon now detects clock jumps instead of treating them as elapsed idle time
• Fixed daemon not exiting cleanly after the binary is upgraded (e.g. `brew upgrade`), causing dispatched agents to crash-loop on the deleted path
• Fixed background agents crash-looping when the Claude-in-Chrome extension is connected without a shared tab
• Fixed clicking links in an attached `claude agents` session — the background worker's headless browser shim no longer applies while attached
• Fixed `claude agents` "v to open in editor" using the daemon's default editor instead of your shell's `$EDITOR`/`$VISUAL`
• Fixed `claude agents` deadlocking on Windows with network-drive working directories; Ctrl+C now works during startup
• Fixed background-color bleed when attaching to a `claude agents` session from Apple Terminal or other 256-color-only terminals
• Fixed `claude --bg --dangerously-skip-permissions` not persisting across retire/wake
• Fixed session titles being derived from the URL when the first message is a link
• Fixed redundant `set_model` requests from remote clients injecting duplicate `/model` breadcrumbs into the transcript
• Fixed plugins using `skills: ["./"]` showing a false "path escapes plugin directory" error
• Fixed plugin cache cleanup deleting the active plugin version directory when no installation metadata is present
• Fixed `/plugin` browse pane showing "0 installs" for newly published plugins
• Fixed plugin advisories not naming every `plugin.json` key that shadows a default folder
• Improved reactive compaction: the first summarize attempt now seeds from the original request's overflow size, avoiding a wasted near-full-context retry
• Improved hook configuration error: configuring a prompt- or agent-type hook for `SessionStart`/`Setup`/`SubagentStart` now shows a clear "use a command-type hook instead" error
• Removed stale `/model claude-sonnet-4-20250514` suggestion from Usage Policy refusal messages

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.141
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [config-env] terminalSequence: Hook JSON field — emit desktop notifications, window titles, bells
+ [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_PREFER_HTTPS: Clone GitHub plugin sources over HTTPS instead of SSH
+ [config-env] ANTHROPIC_WORKSPACE_ID: Scope minted token to specific workspace in identity federation
+ [workflows-tips] Summarize up to here: Rewind menu option — compress earlier context, keep recent turns
~ [cli-flags] claude agents: Agent view — list sessions; --cwd <path> to scope dir
~ [slash-commands] /feedback: Submit feedback; include recent sessions (alias: /bug)
- [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID
- [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_ALTERNATE_SCREEN
- [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_FEEDBACK_SURVEY_FOR_OTEL

Full changelog

• Added `terminalSequence` field to hook JSON output so hooks can emit desktop notifications, window titles, and bells without a controlling terminal
• Added `CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN_PREFER_HTTPS` to clone GitHub plugin sources over HTTPS instead of SSH, for environments without a GitHub SSH key
• Added `ANTHROPIC_WORKSPACE_ID` environment variable for workload identity federation — scopes the minted token to a specific workspace when the federation rule covers more than one
• Added `claude agents --cwd <path>` to scope the session list to a directory
• `/feedback` can now include recent sessions (last 24 hours or 7 days) for issues spanning more than the current session
• Rewind menu: added "Summarize up to here" to compress earlier context while keeping recent turns intact

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.140
item.description:
Full changelog

• Improved Agent tool `subagent_type` matching to accept case- and separator-insensitive values
• Updated agent color palette
• Fixed `/goal` silently hanging when `disableAllHooks` or `allowManagedHooksOnly` is set

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.139
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [slash-commands] /goal [condition]: Set completion condition; Claude works across turns until met
+ [slash-commands] /scroll-speed: Tune mouse wheel scroll speed with live preview
+ [keyboard-shortcuts] { / }: Jump between user prompts (transcript view)
+ [keyboard-shortcuts] ?: Show keyboard shortcuts (transcript view)
+ [cli-flags] claude agents: Agent view — list every CC session (running/blocked/done)
+ [cli-flags] claude plugin details <name>: Show plugin component inventory and projected token cost
+ [config-env] CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR: Project dir passed to MCP stdio servers and hooks env
+ [config-env] args: string[]: Hook exec form — spawn directly without shell
+ [config-env] continueOnBlock: PostToolUse: feed rejection reason back to Claude, continue turn
+ [mcp-servers] ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}: Reference project dir in MCP server commands
+ [workflows-tips] API key → no cloud: API key disables Remote Control, /schedule, claude.ai MCP, notifications
- [keyboard-shortcuts] Ctrl V
- [keyboard-shortcuts] P
- [slash-commands] /cost
- [slash-commands] /team-onboarding
- [config-env] wslInheritsWindowsSettings
- [config-env] CwdChanged
- [config-env] FileChanged

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.137
item.description:
Full changelog

• [VSCode] Fixed extension failing to activate on Windows

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.136
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [config-env] autoMode.hard_deny: Block unconditionally regardless of user intent or allow exceptions
+ [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_FEEDBACK_SURVEY_FOR_OTEL: Re-enable session quality survey for OTEL enterprises
- [config-env] forceRemoteSettingsRefresh
- [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.133
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [config-env] worktree.baseRef: fresh|head — base branch for worktrees (default changed)
+ [config-env] CLAUDE_EFFORT: Current effort level in hooks and Bash tool
~ [skills-agents] ${CLAUDE_EFFORT}: Current effort level (skills, hooks, Bash tool)
- [config-env] blockedMarketplaces
- [config-env] strictKnownMarketplaces

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.132
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID: Session ID in Bash tool subprocess env
+ [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_ALTERNATE_SCREEN: Opt out of fullscreen alternate-screen renderer
- [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_FORCE_SYNC_OUTPUT
- [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_PACKAGE_MANAGER_AUTO_UPDATE

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.129
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [cli-flags] --plugin-url: Fetch plugin .zip archive from URL for session
+ [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_FORCE_SYNC_OUTPUT: Force synchronized output (Emacs eat etc.)
+ [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_PACKAGE_MANAGER_AUTO_UPDATE: Auto-update on Homebrew/WinGet installations
+ [config-env] skillOverrides: Control skill visibility: off/user-invocable-only/name-only
- [config-env] prUrlTemplate
- [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_PERFORCE_MODE
- [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_USE_MANTLE

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.128
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [cli-flags] --plugin-dir: Load plugin from directory or .zip archive
+ [mcp-servers] workspace: Reserved server name — existing servers skipped with warning
~ [slash-commands] /color [color]: Set prompt-bar color; bare = random

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.126
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [cli-flags] claude project purge [path]: Delete all CC state for project; --dry-run, -y, -i, --all
~ [cli-flags] --dangerously-skip-permissions: Skip all prompts; catastrophic rm still prompts ⚠️

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.122
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [config-env] ANTHROPIC_BEDROCK_SERVICE_TIER: Select Bedrock service tier (default/flex/priority)
- [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_HIDE_CWD

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.121
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [mcp-servers] alwaysLoad: Skip tool-search deferral for server tools
+ [cli-flags] claude plugin prune: Remove orphaned auto-installed plugins
~ [config-env] PostToolUse: After tool executes (duration_ms; can replace output)

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.120
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [cli-flags] claude ultrareview [target]: Run /ultrareview non-interactively; --json for raw
+ [skills-agents] ${CLAUDE_EFFORT}: Current effort level in skill content

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.119
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [config-env] prUrlTemplate: Custom code-review URL for footer PR badge
+ [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_HIDE_CWD: Hide working directory in startup logo
+ [config-env] PostToolUseFailure: After tool fails (duration_ms included)
+ [cli-flags] --from-pr: Load PR/MR from GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket/GHE URLs
~ [config-env] PostToolUse: After tool executes (duration_ms included)
- [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_AWAY_SUMMARY
- [config-env] CLAUDE_CODE_FORK_SUBAGENT
- [config-env] "defer" decision

item.title: Claude Code v2.1.118
item.description:
Cheatsheet changes

+ [keyboard-shortcuts] v / V (vim mode): Visual / visual-line mode with selection
+ [config-env] ~/.claude/themes/: Custom theme JSON files
+ [config-env] wslInheritsWindowsSettings: WSL inherits Windows managed settings
+ [config-env] autoMode.$defaults: Extend built-in auto mode rules instead of replacing
+ [config-env] DISABLE_UPDATES: Block all update paths including manual
+ [config-env] mcp_tool type: Invoke MCP tool directly from hook
+ [cli-flags] claude plugin tag: Create release git tag for plugin
~ [slash-commands] /cost: Alias for /usage (cost tab)
~ [slash-commands] /usage: Usage stats, cost, and rate status
- [config-env] MCP_CONNECTION_NONBLOCKING
- [config-env] ENABLE_PROMPT_CACHING_1H
- [config-env] showThinkingSummaries
- [config-env] refreshInterval
- [config-env] hookSpecificOutput.sessionTitle
